title: Redis cluster slots cache refresh failure
symptom: When starting n8n in queue mode with Redis cluster, it throws 'Failed to refresh slots cache'. This prevents the application from functioning correctly.
not_this_if: No error related to slots cache
root_cause: The error occurs when the Redis client cannot refresh the slots cache, which is essential for routing commands to the correct nodes in a Redis cluster. This can happen due to misconfiguration of the cluster nodes or network issues preventing access to the Redis cluster.
fix_steps: Set QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_HOST to one of the cluster nodes
Set QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_PORT to the corresponding port
Check logs for any further errors
agent_instruction: Configure QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_HOST and QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_PORT to test the Redis connection.
